phases.label: Pygame Basics
phases.description: Game loop, sprites, and event handling.

topics.label: Setup & Game Loop
topics.description: pygame.init, display, clock.tick, and the while running loop.

topics.label: Drawing
topics.description: pygame.draw (rect, circle, line) and Surface.blit for images.

topics.label: Events & Input
topics.description: pygame.event.get, KEYDOWN, MOUSEBUTTONDOWN. Handle player input.

topics.label: Sprites & Groups
topics.description: pygame.sprite.Sprite and Group for managing game objects efficiently.

topics.label: Collision Detection
topics.description: spritecollide, collide_rect, collide_mask. Detect overlapping objects.

topics.label: Sound & Music
topics.description: pygame.mixer for sound effects and music playback.
